memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from Eyton's Antiquities of Shropshire, Vol. X, p. 187

Richard Corbet (III), was married to a Lady named Petronilla, who is said to have brought the estates at Booley and Edgbolton to the Corbe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla Booley於1216年出生在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利時，她的父親Boulet de Booley24歲，母親Joana de Torbet24歲。她於1231年與Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1272年在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Booley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Booley in Stanton upon Hine Heath (Shrops).

variants.name: Bouley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Albenie, Aurele, Autrey, Laurent, Napoleon, Ovila, Rosaire.
French: variant of   Boulay   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla Booley was born in 1216, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, her father, Boulet de Booley, was 24 and her mother, Joana de Torbet, was 24. She married Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire in 1231, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1272, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronilla Booley est née en 1216, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Boulet de Booley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joana de Torbet, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire en 1231, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1272, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Booley è nata il nel 1216 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Boulet de Booley, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joana de Torbet, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire nel 1231, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1272, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronilla Booleyが1216年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Boulet de Booleyは24歳，母Joana de Torbetは24歳であった。1231年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでRichard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1272年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで56歳で死去した。

ko.Moreton Toret, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스베스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla Booley(이)가 1216년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Boulet de Booley(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joana de Torbet(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Booley nasceu em 1216, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Boulet de Booley, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joana de Torbet, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire em 1231, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1272, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.Moreton Toret, Shropshire, England: моретон би освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla Booley родилась в 1216 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Boulet de Booley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joana de Torbet, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire в 1231 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1272 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.
